title: corethrogyne californica var. incana
intro: Corethrogyne californica var. incana, also known as California silverbrush, is a shrub native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenes. Herbal preparations of Corethrogyne californica var. incana can be made into teas, infusions, or salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
